title: pourouma bicolor subsp. tessmannii
intro: Pourouma bicolor subsp. tessmannii is a species of plant in the family Chrysobalanaceae, commonly known as a type of Pourouma tree. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pourouma bicolor subsp. tessmannii include the ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. The plant is typically prepared in herbal tea or infusion form, which can be made by steeping the leaves or bark in hot water.
